description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style firearm with a boxy, utilitarian design, reminiscent of the MAC-10. The body is primarily matte black metal, featuring a rectangular receiver with minimal external ornamentation. A folding wire stock is attached to the rear, allowing for compact storage or shoulder support during use. The magazine is a long, detachable box type, inserted vertically into the grip, which is also squared and robust. The top of the receiver has simple iron sights, and the barrel is short, protruding only slightly from the front of the receiver. The overall construction suggests durability and ease of use in close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun with a folding wire stock, box magazine, and short barrel, designed for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening, front sight, and the alignment of the receiver and magazine.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the folding wire stock, magazine, trigger, and the overall boxy profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver, rear sight, and the top of the magazine.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the wire stock folded, magazine, and the ejection port area.
